name: great-minds
description: 14 legendary personas (Jobs, Musk, Buffett, Ive, Hamilton, Angelou, Rubin, Huang, Winfrey, Rhimes, Blakely, Aurelius, Jackson, Sorkin) for debate, board reviews, planning, and creative work. Available as a full autonomous agency or a lightweight co-work plugin.

plugins.name: great-minds
plugins.description: Full autonomous agency — 14 personas + cron-driven pipeline, daemon memory, worktree isolation, end-to-end PRD-to-ship. For Claude Code power users.

plugins.name: great-minds-lite
plugins.description: 14 personas + co-work skills (debate, board review, plan, publish, video, anatomy, scope-check, brain). Single-session, no cron, no daemon. For Cowork + Claude Code.
